name: Vasquez
look: a sun-weathered crawler-trader in a patched amber pressure suit, a cracked visor pushed up over a wry grin, dust ground into every seam

name: Rourke
look: a stranded pressure-hauler in a torn ochre suit, visor spidered with dust scratches, one glove wrapped in silver repair tape

name: Marrow
look: a lean salvage runner in a soot-black suit with a cracked salvage beacon, tool hooks clacking against the oxygen pack

name: Kline Expedition
look: a polished corporate survey crew in matched teal suits, sponsor decals still clean, posture too confident for the dust

name: Okonkwo
look: a crisp teal UNOMA pressure suit with a quartermaster's shoulder insignia, a clipboard-slate clipped at the hip, a comms headset over the helmet seal

name: Reyes
look: a grizzled ice-prospector in a rime-frosted rust-orange suit, regolith ground into the gauntlets, a chipped sample-corer slung across the chest
